scripts.text:
SELECT * INTO #T_FACT_JOB FROM EDW.FACT_JOB;

SELECT LeadID,COUNT(DISTINCT CAST(ContractDate AS DATE)) AS JobCount INTO #T_Multiple_Jobs 
FROM #T_FACT_JOB 
GROUP BY LeadID;

SELECT A.*,B.JobCount INTO #T_FACT_JOB_1 
FROM #T_FACT_JOB A
LEFT JOIN #T_Multiple_Jobs B 
ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID;


--*******************

WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D

	)



SELECT 
Division,
DAY,
CalendarDate,
ApptDate,
BranchID,
ProductID,
COALESCE(BTD,0) 					AS BTD                 ,
COALESCE(CANCELLED,0)				AS CANCELLED           ,
COALESCE(DEMO,0)					AS DEMO                ,
COALESCE(NET_ISSUED,0)				AS NET_ISSUED          ,
COALESCE(SOLD,0)					AS SOLD                ,
COALESCE(TOTAL_CANCEL,0)			AS TOTAL_CANCEL        ,
COALESCE(NETSALES,0.00)				AS NETSALES            ,
COALESCE(BTD_AMT,0.00)				AS BTD_AMT             ,
COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT,0.00)		AS CANCELLED_AMT       ,
COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00)			AS GROSS_SALES         ,
COALESCE(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,0.00)		AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	   ,
COALESCE(NETSALES_AMT,0.00)			AS NETSALES_AMT		   ,
COALESCE(SET_COUNT,0.00)			AS SET_COUNT		   ,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
INTO #T_ACTUAL
FROM 
	(

		SELECT 
		A.Division,
		M3.BranchID,
		M3.ProductID,
		DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
		A.CalendarDate,
		A.CalendarDate AS ApptDate,
		SUM(BTD)				AS BTD,
		SUM(CANCELLED)			AS CANCELLED,
		CASE WHEN A.CalendarDate> GETDATE() THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT DEMO)		END		AS DEMO,
		CASE WHEN A.CalendarDate> GETDATE() THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT NET_ISSUED)	END		AS NET_ISSUED,
		CASE WHEN A.CalendarDate> GETDATE() THEN 0 ELSE SUM(SOLD)					END		AS SOLD,
		SUM(TOTAL_CANCEL)		AS TOTAL_CANCEL,
		SUM(NETSALES)			AS NETSALES,
		SUM(BTD_AMT)			AS BTD_AMT,
		SUM(CANCELLED_AMT)		AS CANCELLED_AMT,
		SUM(GROSS_SALES)		AS GROSS_SALES,
		SUM(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT)	AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
		SUM(NETSALES_AMT)		AS NETSALES_AMT,
		SUM(SET_COUNT)			AS SET_COUNT

		FROM CAL A 
		LEFT JOIN 
		(
			SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				ApptDate,
				BTD,
				CANCELLED,
				DEMO,
				NET_ISSUED,
				SOLD,
				(BTD + CANCELLED)			AS TOTAL_CANCEL,
				(SOLD - (BTD + CANCELLED) ) AS NETSALES,
				
				BTD_AMT,
				CANCELLED_AMT,
				SOLD_AMT AS GROSS_SALES,
				(BTD_AMT + CANCELLED_AMT) AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
				(SOLD_AMT - (BTD_AMT + CANCELLED_AMT) ) AS NETSALES_AMT,
				SET_COUNT
				FROM
				(
						SELECT 
						Division,
						BranchID,
						ProductID,
						ApptDate,
						GrossSales,
						CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='BANK TURN DOWN' AND GrossSales >0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BTD,
						CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='BANK TURN DOWN' AND GrossSales >0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS BTD_AMT,
						CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' AND GrossSales >0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CANCELLED,
						CASE WHEN UPPER(UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY)='CANCELLED' AND GrossSales >0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS CANCELLED_AMT,
						CASE WHEN LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NOT NULL AND EverSat>0 		THEN LeadID ELSE NULL END AS DEMO,
						CASE WHEN LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NOT NULL AND EverNetIssued>0 	THEN LeadID ELSE NULL END AS NET_ISSUED,
						CASE WHEN GrossSales > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SOLD,
						CASE WHEN GrossSales > 0 THEN GrossSales ELSE 0 END AS SOLD_AMT,
						EverSet AS SET_COUNT
						FROM 
						(
								SELECT
								B.Division,
								B.BranchID,
								B.ProductID,
								CASE 
									WHEN A.Division IN ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN A.GrossAmount ELSE 
										(CASE WHEN A.JobNetAmt>0 THEN JobNetAmt ELSE A.GrossAmount END) END AS GrossSales,
								
								CASE 
									WHEN A.JobCount > 1 THEN CAST(B.ApptDate AS DATE)
									ELSE COALESCE(CAST(A.ContractDate AS DATE),CAST(B.ApptDate AS DATE)) 
									END AS ApptDate,
									
								UPPER(C.UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY) AS UNI_JOBSTATUSCATEGORY,
								CASE WHEN B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NULL OR B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID='' OR B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID='0' THEN NULL ELSE B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID END AS LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
								B.EverSat,
								B.EverNetIssued,
								B.LeadID,
								CASE WHEN B.EverSet =1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EverSet
								
								FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
								LEFT JOIN #T_FACT_JOB_1  A
								ON A.LeadID = B.LeadID
								LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS C
								ON A.JobStatusID = C.JobStatusID

								WHERE CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE)  >= CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(GETDATE())-4,'-01-01') AS DATE)
								
								) M1
							
							) M2
		
						) M3
		
		ON A.CalendarDate = M3.ApptDate
		AND A.Division = M3.Division
		WHERE A.CalendarDate>='2022-01-01' AND A.CalendarDate<=GETDATE() + 6
		GROUP BY A.Division,A.CalendarDate,M3.BranchID,M3.ProductID
		
		) M_FINAL;
		
		








TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL];


INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
SELECT * FROM #T_ACTUAL;



UPDATE [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
SET

BTD                 =0,
CANCELLED           =0,
DEMO                =0,
NET_ISSUED          =0,
SOLD                =0,
TOTAL_CANCEL        =0,
NETSALES            =0.000,
BTD_AMT             =0.000,
CANCELLED_AMT       =0.000,
GROSS_SALES         =0.000,
TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	=0.000,
NETSALES_AMT		=0.000,
SET_COUNT			=0

WHERE CalendarDate = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D

	)


SELECT 
Division,
DAY,
CalendarDate,
EntryDate,
BranchID,
ProductID,
TX_Channel,
TX_SourceGroup,
TX_SourceCode,
COALESCE(NET_ISSUED,0)				AS NET_ISSUED          ,
COALESCE(SET_COUNT,0.00)			AS SET_COUNT		   ,
COALESCE(RAW_LEAD_COUNT,0.00)		AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT	   ,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
INTO #T_ACTUAL_MRK
FROM 
	(

		SELECT 
		A.Division,
		M3.BranchID,
		M3.ProductID,
		TX_Channel,
		TX_SourceGroup,
		TX_SourceCode,
		DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
		A.CalendarDate,
		A.CalendarDate AS EntryDate,
		COUNT(DISTINCT LeadID)		AS RAW_LEAD_COUNT,
		COUNT(DISTINCT NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED,
		SUM(SET_COUNT)				AS SET_COUNT

		FROM CAL A 
		LEFT JOIN 
		(
			SELECT 
				M2.Division,
				M2.BranchID,
				M2.ProductID,
				SS.TX_Channel,
				SS.TX_SourceGroup,
				SS.TX_SourceCode,
				M2.EntryDate,
				M2.LeadID,
				M2.NET_ISSUED,
				M2.SET_COUNT
				FROM
				(
						SELECT 
						Division,
						BranchID,
						ProductID,
						LeadSubSourceID,
						EntryDate,
						CASE WHEN LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NOT NULL AND EverNetIssued>0 	THEN LeadID ELSE NULL END 			AS NET_ISSUED,
						EverSet AS SET_COUNT,
						LeadID
						FROM 
						(
								SELECT
								B.Division,
								B.BranchID,
								B.ProductID,
								B.LeadSubSourceID,								
								CAST(EntryDate AS DATE) AS EntryDate,
									
								CASE WHEN B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID IS NULL OR B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID='' OR B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID='0' THEN NULL ELSE B.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID END AS LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
								B.EverSat,
								B.EverNetIssued,
								B.LeadID,
								CASE WHEN B.EverSet =1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS EverSet
								
								FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD B
	
								WHERE CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE)  >= CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(GETDATE())-4,'-01-01') AS DATE)
								AND CAST(B.EntryDate AS DATE)  <= GETDATE()
								
								) M1
							
							) M2
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING SS
				ON M2.LeadSubSourceID = SS.LeadSubSourceID
		
						) M3
		
		ON A.CalendarDate = M3.EntryDate
		AND A.Division = M3.Division
		WHERE A.CalendarDate>='2022-01-01' AND A.CalendarDate<=GETDATE()
		AND TX_SourceGroup IS NOT NULL AND TX_SourceGroup!='0' AND TX_SourceGroup!='NA'
		AND ProductID!='PBC-3'
		GROUP BY A.Division,A.CalendarDate,M3.BranchID,M3.ProductID,
		M3.TX_Channel,
		M3.TX_SourceGroup,
		M3.TX_SourceCode
		
		) M_FINAL;
		
		








TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_MRK];


INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_MRK]
SELECT * FROM #T_ACTUAL_MRK;
